PREDICATES:
performs_in_talent_shows(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attends_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
inactive_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested community member
chaperones_dances(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
young_child_or_teens(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wishes_to_further_education(x) ::: x wishes to further their academic careers and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (performs_in_talent_shows(x) -> (attends_events(x) & student(x)))
forall x ((performs_in_talent_shows(x) & attends_events(x)) | inactive_member(x))
forall x (chaperones_dances(x) -> ~student(x))
forall x (inactive_member(x) -> chaperones_dances(x))
forall x (young_child_or_teens(x) & wishes_to_further_education(x) -> student(x))
(performs_in_talent_shows(bonnie) | ~(attends_events(bonnie) & student(bonnie)))

CONCLUSION:
performs_in_talent_shows(bonnie)

PREDICATES:
inClub(x) ::: x is in the club
performShow(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows
attendEvents(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
inactive(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested community member
chaperoneDance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
youngChildTeen(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wishCareer(x) ::: x wishes to further her academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (inClub(x) -> (performShow(x) \/ inactive(x)))
forall x (inClub(x) -> (performShow(x) -> attendEvents(x)))
forall x (inClub(x) -> (chaperoneDance(x) -> ~student(x)))
forall x (inactive(x) -> chaperoneDance(x))
forall x (youngChildTeen(x) /\ wishCareer(x) /\ inClub(x) -> student(x))
inClub(bonnie) -> (attendEvents(bonnie) /\ student(bonnie) \/ ~attendEvents(bonnie) /\ ~student(bonnie))

CONCLUSION:
(inClub(bonnie) /\ (youngChildTeen(bonnie) /\ wishCareer(bonnie) /\ chaperoneDance(bonnie) \/ ~youngChildTeen(bonnie) /\ ~wishCareer(bonnie))) -> (student(bonnie) \/ inactive(bonnie))

PREDICATES:

performShow(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attendEvents(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
inactive(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested community member
chaperoneDance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
wishAcademic(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager who wishes to further their academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (inClub(x) -> (performShow(x) \/ attendEvents(x)))
forall x (inClub(x) -> (performShow(x) \/ inactive(x)))
forall x (inClub(x) -> (chaperoneDance(x) -> ~student(x)))
forall x (inactive(x) -> chaperoneDance(x))
forall x (student(x) -> wishAcademic(x))
inClub(bonnie) -> (chaperoneDance(bonnie) \/ (¬chaperoneDance(bonnie) -> performShow(bonnie)))
inClub(bonnie) -> (attendEvents(bonnie) /\ student(bonnie) \/ ¬(attendEvents(bonnie) /\ student(bonnie)))

CONCLUSION:
wishAcademic(bonnie) /\ inactive(bonnie)
